ValidationRule.description: Cannot Approve/Reverse/Upost payment for closed Accounting Period
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: /*Y_hidden_AccEnabled__c && isPickVal(Payment_Status__c,'Approved') && ISCHANGED(Payment_Status__c) && isPickVal( PRIORVALUE(Payment_Status__c) ,'Pending') && Accounting_Period__r.Closed__c == true*/ false
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Accounting Period is Closed. Please reopen the period or select a new Accounting Period
